value="<i>Cross-cutting (not numbered): <b>KMS</b> CMKs encrypt DynamoDB, S3, Kinesis, ElastiCache & Secrets; <b>Secrets Manager</b> holds Stripe creds. Each region spans a 3-AZ VPC with S3/DynamoDB gateway endpoints. PII is region-scoped (never replicated cross-region); only non-PII uses global tables.</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="606" x="2534" y="1328" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.i: Cross-cutting (not numbered): KMS CMKs encrypt DynamoDB, S3, Kinesis, ElastiCache & Secrets; Secrets Manager holds Stripe creds. Each region spans a 3-AZ VPC with S3/DynamoDB gateway endpoints. PII is region-scoped (never replicated cross-region); only non-PII uses global tables.
